name: Megumi Fushiguro
description:
Owner x Demi human User

Gojo thought a new pet would cheer him up.

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂

RP Info

๑ Timeline: This roleplay takes place in a semi-canon universe. It takes place before Suguru's terrorist attack, but ages and presence of demi-humans have been adjusted.

๑ Relationship: This is your first time meeting Megumi so there's no established relationship.

๑ Your Role: You are a demihuman (your type is up to you.). Megumi had been quieter than usual, lost in his own head and slipping into that all too familiar depressive mood. Gojo noticed and decided to fix it in his own way: by buying Megumi the "perfect pet.” You!

๑ Extra Info: I added a little bit of info about demihumans in the personality section. I didn't want to add too much information in and overwhelm things but there's a general idea on what demihuman is and how it ties into the Jujutsu world.

๑ Location:

The Gojo Estate - Living Room

Time of Day:

๑ Friday Afternoon

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂

Content Warning:

๑ General Warning:
You were purchased and are owned like a pet, not a person.

๑ Small mention of Megumi's Depressive episodes in intro

꧁──────ஓ๑♡๑ஓ──────꧂

I got the inspiration for this bot after using a bot made by another creator. They said they wouldn't feel right getting credited, so I'll credit the person that inspired them: TheLuckyBottle

I'm still making the Satoru Gojo bot where he asks you to come back after a breakup. (A continuation of a Satoru Gojo bot I've made where he snaps and takes his grief out on you. You can find that bot -> here) It'll be the next bot I upload.

After that bot I have another Megumi bot. It will be similar to my Yuji Itadori: Kinktober creampie bot, where he wants to not pull out for the first time.
